LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS D&S TOWING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SIERRA TOWING AND DANIEL SOUZA'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 18, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 25, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: E. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS D&S TOWING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION D/B/A AND DANIEL SOUZA'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS GRANTED. THE ENDS OF JUSTICE AND THE CONVENIENCE OF WITNESSES WOULD BE PROMOTED BY CHANGING VENUE TO PLACER COUNTY WHERE THE ACCIDENT OCCURRED AND MANY OF THE WITNESSES ARE LOCATED AWAY FROM SAN FRANCISCO, WHICH HAS NO CONNECTION AT ALL TO THIS CASE. (CCP 397(C).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: WILLIAM JEANNEY, ESQ., 775.335.9999, FOR PLAINTIFF JOAN TSANG.
GAIL RICHARDSON, ESQ., 818.240.2300, FOR DEFENDANTS D&S TOWING AND DANIEL SOUZA.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS D&S TOWING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION D/B/A AND DANIEL SOUZA'S MOTION To Change Venue IS Granted. The ends of justice and the convenience of witnesses would be promoted by changing venue to Placer County where the accident occurred and many of the witnesses are located away from San Francisco, which has no connection at all to this case. (CCP 397(c).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Continued To Nov-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS D&S TOWING, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SIERRA TOWING AND DANIEL SOUZA'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE.

Appearanes: Gail W. Richardson of Parker Straus, LLP (818.240.2300) for defendants and moving parties; No other appearances.

Counsel requests an extra day to provide courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. The Court modifies its ruling as follows: Continued to November 18, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 25, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-27-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
